x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
A simple tool for removing `bin` and `obj` folders. Will recursively
            traverse the current working directory and remove folders as it finds
            them.

options.name: path
options.description: Where to start scrubbing away `bin` and `obj` folders [default: .]

options.name: ask
options.description:
Ask before removing a folder. Set to `false` to skip any user
interaction [default: True]

options.name: list
options.description: Only print folder names, do not remove anyhing. [default: False]
